name: /standards-diff dry-run prints the planned decision without writing to decisions.jsonl
command: mkdir -p standards/snapshots && printf 'r: a\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml && printf 'r: b\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-diff.sh" --source owasp-asvs --current standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.current.yaml --upstream standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.upstream.yaml --decide adopt --change r --decisions standards/decisions.jsonl --dry-run --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>out.txt && [ ! -f standards/decisions.jsonl ] && grep -q 'planned: adopt r' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
